choice: lib/etrade/* : OAuth 1.0a (oauth.ts, HMAC-SHA1 over the RFC 5849 base string, oob verifier flow) — request_token -> authorizeUrl -> access_token. Access tokens stored AES-256-GCM encrypted at rest (crypto.ts, key from ETRADE_ENC_KEY||AUTH_SECRET) in the etrade_connections table (one per household). client.ts wraps signed GETs with pure parsers for accounts/list, balance (Computed.RealTimeValues.totalAccountValue), portfolio. syncNow (lib/actions/etrade.ts): list accounts -> find-or-create a synced asset per E*TRADE account (bucket via mapping.ts: IRA/rollover/401/roth/retire -> tax_deferred else post_tax, decision 8a2f4e15) -> write a dated Snapshot batch (source=etrade, shared batchId) -> store positions per sync in the positions table sharing that batchId. Read-only. Env swap (E6-S4): config.ts resolveEtradeConfig picks baseUrl (apisb vs api) + the per-env consumer key/secret by ETRADE_ENV; the connection persists its env so sync targets the right environment. Connect/verifier UI on Assets; request token held in an encrypted httpOnly cookie between steps.
rationale: [build-originated] db09d3a5/3f1b6b21/8a2f4e15 fixed the WHAT (interactive OAuth, Accounts API, account->bucket, encrypted tokens) but not: OAuth 1.0a signing details, AES-256-GCM at rest, the find-or-create synced-asset-per-account provisioning, positions sharing the snapshot batchId, and env-var-driven sandbox/prod swap. NOTE: live handshake requires real E*TRADE developer credentials (the R2 external long pole) — pure logic (signing, crypto, parsers, mapping) is unit-tested (11 tests); the live sandbox round-trip is unverified pending the key.
